overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a character in Hufflepuff robes walking through a snowy gothic castle courtyard, ascending stone staircases, traversing a covered cloister, and approaching a large wooden entrance door. The scene features medieval architecture, falling snow, and other student characters walking through the grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered castle courtyard with central pathway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard toward the castle main building

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: large gothic castle with spires and snow-covered roofs dominating the background
snow-covered stone ground with circular patterns
ornate stone balustrades lining the pathway
ornate stone balustrades lining the pathway
lit fire bowl on a pedestal providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, snow-covered courtyard toward a massive gothic castle. Other students in wizard robes walk ahead, and stone railings line the path. A burning brazier glows on the right side as snow falls gently.

events.description: begins ascending the lower stone stairs toward the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the initial set of stone stairs following other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: large tiered stone fountain with snow on its edges
wide stone staircase leading up to the castle

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large stone fountain and begins ascending the wide stone stairs toward the castle. The crowd thins out as students disperse, and the main building looms closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase and upper terrace

events.description: turns slightly left while continuing to ascend the upper staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the upper stone stairs alongside stone balustrades

entered.detail: elevated stone platform with ornate railings
elevated stone platform with ornate railings

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the grand stone staircase, passing stone terraces on both sides. The fountain falls behind as the castle facade draws nearer, with detailed gothic architecture becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gothic cloister with pointed arches

events.description: enters the covered gothic walkway with stone columns and pointed arches

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered cloister passage toward the main entrance

entered.detail: covered passage with gothic pointed arches and stone columns
ornate stone arches framing the walkway
ornate stone arches framing the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered gothic cloister with intricate stone arches and columns. The space is sheltered from the snow, with dimmer lighting, and the main entrance becomes visible through the archway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main castle entrance with large wooden doors

events.description: exits the covered walkway and approaches the main entrance with icicles
slows and stops at the large wooden entrance door

agents.ego_description: approaching and arriving at the large wooden entrance door of the castle

entered.detail: massive dark wooden door with metal studs and grid pattern
long icicles hanging from the stone eaves
long icicles hanging from the stone eaves

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character approaches the imposing main entrance with large wooden doors and hanging icicles. The camera slows as it reaches the entrance, ending at the threshold of the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snowy courtyard into the sheltered entrance of a gothic castle. It begins by following a character through the falling snow past glowing braziers and other students, moving steadily toward the massive stone structure. As the character reaches a large fountain, the camera ascends a grand stone staircase, leaving the crowd behind while the detailed gothic facade looms closer. The scene then shifts into a covered cloister, where the open snowfall is replaced by the dim lighting of intricate stone arches and columns. Finally, the camera emerges from the walkway to approach the imposing main entrance, slowing as it reaches the large wooden doors and hanging icicles at the castle threshold.
